auth.homeTitle: Plan and share travel stories faster.
auth.homeBody: A travel workspace for trips, tours, photos, notes, and destination stories.
auth.continueFeed: Sign in to manage your trips, or browse the travel feed.
auth.loginTitle: Your travel studio for trips, tours, and memories.
auth.loginBody: Collect trip photos, organize destinations, and prepare polished travel stories.
auth.loginProofFeedBody: Keep destinations, tours, media, and notes organized.
auth.loginProofPrivateBody: Draft captions and trip highlights before sharing.
auth.registerTitle: Create a better place for your travel history.
auth.registerBody: Build a simple profile for trips, tours, destinations, and shared memories.
auth.name: Name

feed.title: Travel Feed
feed.subtitle: Explore trip albums, tour moments, destinations, captions, and locations in one place.
feed.firstPost: Your travel feed is ready. Trip albums and destination stories will appear here.
feed.secondPost: Romlek is ready for trip histories, tour albums, travel media, and destination notes.

explore.title: Explore
explore.searchPlaceholder: Search trips, destinations, tours, and travelers

media.title: Travel Studio
media.subtitle: Manage trip photos, tour videos, documents, and travel albums.
media.uploadBody: Add photos, videos, tickets, maps, or files to your travel library.
media.publicUploadBody: Requires destination and story details before upload.
media.privateUploadBody: Stored in Travel Studio without trip story details.
media.libraryOnlyBody: Stored in Travel Studio without trip story details.
media.forPostingBody: Requires a destination and caption before upload.
media.locationPlaceholder: Destination, city, landmark, hotel, or tour stop
media.captionPlaceholder: Write the travel caption or trip note
media.postDetailsRequired: Destination and caption are required when media is for a trip story.
media.uploadRequiresUploader: Cannot upload because the current user ID is missing. Please sign in again.
media.uploadSuccess: Upload complete. The travel library has been refreshed.
media.postDetailsUpdateError: Unable to update trip story details.
media.postSelectedTitle: Create trip story from {count} library item(s)
media.postSelectedBody: Add the destination and caption to move selected Library media into a Trip Story.
media.postSelectedSuccess: {count} library item(s) moved to Trip Story.
media.batchDeleteBody: This will permanently delete the selected {count} trip media files.
media.emptyBody: Uploaded trip photos and tour videos will appear here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyBody: Likes, replies, follows, and mentions will appear here.

messages.title: Messages
messages.placeholder: Select a conversation to keep the discussion going.

profile.title: Profile
profile.bio: Building a travel history with Romlek.
profile.settingsBody: Adjust language and theme for your Romlek travel workspace.
profile.accountBody: Review the public details attached to this profile.
profile.activityBody: A focused view of recent trips, replies, and travel media.
profile.activityPostBody: A trip recap is ready to turn into captions, highlights, and a travel story.
profile.activityReplyBody: Your travel workspace is ready for reviewing media, tour notes, and trip drafts.
